case_title: GOLDEN GATE UNIVERSITY VS. NATIONAL UNION FIRE INS. CO. OF PITTSBURG, PENN. et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION CONFIRMING SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOLDEN GATE UNIVERSITY

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-29-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
